message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "requirement": "Data Security and Privacy Compliance",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The contract lacks explicit provisions for data security and privacy measures, which are essential for protecting sensitive information.",
      "evidence": [],
      "remediation": "Include specific clauses addressing data security protocols, privacy policies, and compliance with relevant data protection regulations.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "2",
      "source_clause_id": "764e7eeb-a883-456d-a401-e2bc630c60a0",
      "source_excerpt": "The term 'Services' when used in this Agreement means the performance of professional services that include but are not limited to system analysis, program development, personnel training, documentation writing and general business consulting.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Confidentiality Obligations",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "There are no confidentiality obligations outlined in the contract to protect proprietary information shared between the parties.",
      "evidence": [],
      "remediation": "Add a confidentiality clause that outlines the obligations of both parties to protect confidential information.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "2",
      "source_clause_id": "764e7eeb-a883-456d-a401-e2bc630c60a0",
      "source_excerpt": "The term 'Services' when used in this Agreement means the performance of professional services that include but are not limited to system analysis, program development, personnel training, documentation writing and general business consulting.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Audit Rights",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The contract does not provide for audit rights, which are important for ensuring compliance with contractual obligations.",
      "evidence": [],
      "remediation": "Incorporate a clause that grants the Company the right to audit the Developer's compliance with the contract terms.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.4",
      "source_clause_id": "77912e9c-8858-4762-93f9-92bc1f63dbcb",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon approval of the programming specifications, Developer design, in conjunction with Company, an Acceptance test for these specifications. The Acceptance test will follow those standards listed in Annex II.",
      "confidence": 0.6
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Retention of Records",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "There are no provisions regarding the retention of records related to the services provided, which is necessary for compliance and accountability.",
      "evidence": [],
      "remediation": "Add a clause specifying the duration for which records must be retained and the conditions for their disposal.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "ed4aebb9-d94a-4b78-9864-86f4ebef5d61",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.5
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Legal Compliance",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The contract does not include a clause ensuring compliance with applicable laws and regulations, which is critical for legal protection.",
      "evidence": [],
      "remediation": "Include a legal compliance clause that mandates adherence to all relevant laws and regulations.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "fbca1200-9bae-4a0a-8990-7b76afcf59c1",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    }
  ]
}
